title: Sacred Gold
notes:
Does run with around 20fps, but audio is missing.

What I tested so far:
Audio: not working (not detected by the game)
Menu and settings: working
Save and load games: working
Combat: working
Accept Missions: working
Leveling: working

title: Sacred Gold
notes: I thought the game was taking too long to load but when I clicked it started.  Perhaps there are cutscenes that are failing to load.

took about 5 minutes of black screen before starting (had 1 core maxed out the entire time), ran fine through the menu, selected a character and named it and click the play button, went to another black screen which i allowed it to sit in for 15ish minutes (1 core was maxed for about 5 of that 15 min then dropped to 0) before closing the program. have not retried it.
title: Sacred Gold

notes:
first time i tried the game i ran it with no tweaks. 5 min of black screen (with 1 cpu core maxed) before menu, selected character, back to black screen (again 5ish minutes of 1 maxed core then it dropped to 0%) where it sat for ~15 min before i closed it.

attempt 2 i set PROTON_NO_ESYNC launch option. this allowed me to click during the black screen at launch to enter the game rather quickly. selected a character and launched into the game and again black screen but 3ish clicks got me out of the black screen and into the game (guessing some cut sceens just show up as black). played for around and hour and a half. there was static that showed up every now and then (rather loud static pops at that), but that seemed to be the only issue.
title: Sacred Gold

cpu: AMD A9-9410 RADEON R5, 5 COMPUTE CORES 2C+3G
notes: Videos don't play, resulting in black screen. The black screen can be clicked to get into the main menu. Alt+tab works but results in a normal resolution screen at the upper left after tabbing back. Videos can be disabled with the Config.exe. The game runs normal until zoomed out, then it slows down a little to provide us with genuine console experience. Played it until shortly after orc quests with no problems other than the above mentioned.
